paper_focus.title: Quantification of multi-stage recrystallization in low-alloy steel under varying deformation conditions using inhomogeneous-dislocation-density 3D cellular automaton
paper_focus.research_objective: To develop an inhomogeneous-dislocation-density 3D cellular automaton model that accurately predicts multi-stage dynamic recrystallization behavior and flow stress of low-alloy steel under varying deformation conditions.
